group_name.rationale: Clear, unique names avoid misrouting and make reviews/audits easier.

cidrs.description: List of CIDRs that this group applies to.
cidrs.rationale: CIDRs define reachable networks over IAP TCP; overly broad ranges expand blast radius.
cidrs.non-compliant: cidrs = ["0.0.0.0/0"] or unnecessarily broad private ranges without justification

fqdns.description: List of FQDNs that this group applies to.
fqdns.rationale: Restrict to specific internal hostnames; wildcards or public sites dilute access control.

region.description: The region of the tunnel group. Must be the same as the network resources in the group.
region.rationale: Region must match target resources; mismatches can route to the wrong place or fail closed.
region.non-compliant: region = "" or a region that doesn’t match the resources (e.g., "us-east1" while backends are in "australia-southeast1")

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
project.rationale: Ensures the destination group is created in the intended project; mismatches affect the wrong tenant.
